strategyModelDesign.purpose: Pure deterministic read model for pre-draft planning.
Summarize league format, roster structure, and available timing context.
Convert format signals into positional emphasis.
Rank positional planning priority without selecting a player.
Describe early, middle, or turn timing behavior.
Define broad windows for anchors, value pockets, depth, IDP, and K/DST.
List visible tier risk from compact H10 rows.
List market value pockets from H10 market signals.
Prevent early forcing of low-priority or high-opportunity-cost slots.
Generate if/then fallback plans for tier risk and wait uncertainty.
Handle IDP, kicker, and team defense with explicit caveats.
Document missing inputs and validation limits.

draftSlotStrategy.slotStrategySummary: Early-middle slot strategy preview: blend anchor value with flexibility across a 18-pick max wait.

roundPickWindows.label: early anchor window
roundPickWindows.guidance: Blackbird leans toward flexible early value while tracking tier risk before the next window.

roundPickWindows.label: middle-round value windows
roundPickWindows.guidance: Timing signal: compare value pockets against a max snake wait near 18 picks.

roundPickWindows.label: IDP timing window
roundPickWindows.guidance: Use IDP tier risk and named targets before waiting through another full turn.

roundPickWindows.label: K/DST timing window
roundPickWindows.guidance: Keep K/DST in late fill windows unless scoring settings create a measurable format signal.

roundWindowPlanBySlot.guidance: Blackbird leans toward flexible early value while tracking tier risk before the next window.

timingSignals: Early-middle timing signal: balance anchor value with flexibility on the return.

contingencyPlans.trigger: If a QB tier dries up before the next turn
contingencyPlans.response: pivot to the strongest non-QB value pocket and revisit QB on the next timing signal.

contingencyPlans.trigger: If an IDP tier becomes thin
contingencyPlans.response: avoid waiting without named targets and compare DL/LB/DB coverage separately.

contingencyPlans.trigger: If RB/WR value falls below market
contingencyPlans.response: let value pocket evidence compete with roster need before filling a lower-value slot.

contingencyPlans.trigger: If wait guidance lacks named targets
contingencyPlans.response: treat the position as monitor-only and prefer stronger tier or value signals.

specialPositionGuidance.guidance: Plan IDP by position group; low-confidence baselines make tier risk and named targets more important.
